mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO USERINFO ( bid, name, phone, email, storeName, storeType, storeCategory, pw, signDate, agreementDate, marketingDate ) VALUES ( #{bId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{storeName}, #{storeType}, #{storeCategory}, #{pw}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE,
SYSDATE
NULL
)
mapper.select: SELECT bId, name, storeName, storeType, pw FROM USERINFO WHERE bId = #{bId} AND name = #{name} AND pw = #{pw}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERINFO SET pw = #{pw} WHERE bId = #{bId} AND NAME = #{name} AND PHONE = #{phone}
mapper.select: SELECT bId, name FROM USERINFO WHERE bId = #{bId} AND pw = #{pw}
SELECT bId, name, phone FROM USERINFO WHERE phone = #{phone}
SELECT bId FROM USERINFO WHERE bId = #{bId}
SELECT bId FROM USERINFO WHERE bId = #{bId} AND name = #{name} AND phone = #{phone}
